title: The Goa, Daman and Diu (Administration) Act, 1962

provisions.title: Repealed.
provisions.content: [Extension of the jurisdiction of Bombay High Court to Goa, Daman and Diu.] Rep. by the Goa, Daman and Diu Judicial Commissioner's Court (Declaration asHigh Court) Act, 1964 (16 of 1964), section 8 (w.e.f.16-12-1964).
